title: elaphoglossum choquetangae
intro: Elaphoglossum choquetangae is a species of fern in the family Dryopteridaceae, commonly known as the Chocó elaphoglossum. This plant is used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Elaphoglossum choquetangae include treating wounds, reducing fever, and alleviating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Herbal preparations of Elaphoglossum choquetangae typically involve infusions or decoctions of the plant's leaves, which are consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
